results.question: Does AppState initializer in main.ts set backendState to null (not { state: 'loading' })?

evidence.findings: backendState: null at line 31 with comment 'null until first state_changed(loading) event arrives from backend'. No { state: 'loading' } in initial state block.

results.question: Does updateLoadingOverlayForState guard against null backendState without throwing TypeError?

evidence.findings: Guard `if (!state.backendState) { return; }` at line 456-458. Early return prevents all downstream dereferences.

results.question: Does the isAlreadyGenerating guard in next() handle null backendState as false?

evidence.findings: const isAlreadyGenerating = state.backendState !== null && (state.backendState.state === 'generating' || state.backendState.state === 'loading'). Short-circuit AND ensures false when null.

results.question: Does the delete error handler guard against null backendState when restoring prompt?

evidence.findings: if (elements.loadingPrompt && state.backendState !== null && state.backendState.state === 'generating'). Null check before .state access.

results.question: Is the BackendState type in types.ts updated to BackendState | null?

evidence.findings: backendState: BackendState | null; with comment 'null until first state_changed event received from backend'

results.question: Does createMockState() in state-sync-integration.test.js initialize backendState to null?

evidence.findings: backendState: null at line 31 in createMockState() return object

results.question: Does the AC-011 test verify that handleStateChanged(loading) transitions null -> { state: loading }?

evidence.findings: Test at lines 215-230: precondition assert.equal(state.backendState, null), transition to { state: 'loading' }, postcondition assert.equal(state.backendState.state, 'loading')

results.question: Do all 25 frontend integration tests pass?

evidence.findings: node --test output: 25 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped, exit code 0

results.question: Do all Python unit tests still pass (no regressions from frontend changes)?

evidence.findings: 188 passed in 7.70s, exit code 0. No regressions.

test_gate.command: node --test src-tauri/ui/state-sync-integration.test.js && python -m pytest tests/test_cli.py tests/test_weights.py tests/test_config.py tests/test_ipc_handler.py -q --tb=short
test_gate.evidence: 25 JS tests pass + 188 Python tests pass

e2e_tests.evidence: 6 e2e_smoke Python tests pass (including loading state emission test). 25 JS integration tests pass (including AC-011 null-to-loading transition test). Note: This is a Tauri desktop app; CLI subprocess tests serve as e2e tests per story spec.
